financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: Infosys is doing well financially because it keeps making more money and has no debt.
The company is good at managing costs and earns money from different sources, which keeps its earnings strong.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company is good at protecting its information from cyber threats, which helps keep operations running smoothly.
They stay competitive by constantly creating new solutions and keeping up with rules to avoid any legal troubles.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and its operations are well-managed.
They are also good at treating people fairly and responsibly, but there's still room for improvement.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: Infosys doesn't owe money to lenders, giving it more freedom to use its money as needed.
The company has a lot of cash saved up, which helps it pay shareholders and invest in future growth.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains its goals and challenges, but could share more details about its spending plans.
They focus on new technology and hiring skilled workers, but some future plans are uncertain.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: Infosys has a clear plan focused on using new technology and growing its business, which is why it scored high.
The company is aware of challenges but is actively working to overcome them, showing strong leadership in its field.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Infosys is a strong company with no debt and plenty of cash, making it a safe choice for growth.
The company is investing in new technologies like AI, which could help it grow even more in the future.
